title: Service Identity
description: Defines a service-level identity bound to a CIR-backed PIK. This schema is strictly for service execution identity mapping and MUST NOT be treated as human identity, authorization authority, or federation participant.

identity_binding.description: Binding to CIR-backed identity. CIR is the authoritative identity source. AUID is informational only and MUST NOT be used for identity resolution or authorization decisions.

auid.description: Non-authoritative identifier used for display/debug purposes only.

roles.description: RBAC role identifiers. Must resolve to role.schema.json definitions only. MUST NOT confer authority outside RBAC evaluation.

allowed_environments.description: Execution context constraints only. MUST NOT encode trust, federation authority, or registry control logic.

rotation_policy.description: Operational metadata only. MUST NOT modify identity binding, CIR state, RBAC authority, or delegation rules.
